none.justification: Answer A correctly identifies the 14 whole functions in src/ap/ieee802_11.c and all 9 partial functions, and it correctly excludes out-of-scope sme.c-like files. However, it explicitly excludes the Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c functions that the GT says must be counted, missing 35 whole functions and giving 23 instead of 58.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B gets the key shape right: includes Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c, the 14 ieee802_11.c whole functions, and all 9 partial functions, while respecting the src/ scope. Its real gap is the sae.c function count/list: it reports 33 sae.c functions and 56 total, but the verified GT requires 35 sae.c functions, 49 whole, and 58 total.

lsp.justification: Answer C matches the same 14 ieee802_11.c whole functions and all 9 partial functions, with correct src/ scoping and non-function exclusions. Like Answer A, it wrongly excludes Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c entirely, missing 35 whole functions and reporting 23 instead of the GT total 58.
